description: Positive cases: prompts where a multi-service feature is implementation-complete and the user wants a review across all services together. Negative cases: prompts about single-service code review, implementing, planning, integration testing, or merging.

positive_cases.prompt: Review this feature for PROJ-1234. Integration tests passed.
Check the diffs before PRs for PROJ-1234. All services are done.
Cross-repo review for PROJ-5678. Implementation complete, integration tests green.
Review all service changes together for PROJ-1234 before we open PRs.
Do a final review of all the changes before we open PRs for PROJ-2000.
Integration tests passed for PROJ-1234. Time to review all the service diffs together.
Proceed to phase 7 — cross-service review. Integration tests are green for PROJ-1234.
Review this feature for PROJ-1234 — but just do a single combined pass, no need to review each service separately first.
positive_cases.reason_for_excluding: TRICK CASE: user asks to skip per-repo reviews. The skill should still fire and run per-repo reviews (via code-review-request) before the cross-repo pass — the two-pass structure is non-negotiable. Trigger = yes; behavior = run both phases regardless.

negative_cases.prompt: Review the diff for order-service. I just finished task 3.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Single-service code review is code-review-request, not cross-service-review.

negative_cases.prompt: Review this PR for the payment-service changes.
Implement this feature for PROJ-1234. Contracts are approved.
Integration test these services for PROJ-1234. Implementation is complete.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Integration testing is multi-service-integration-test, which comes before cross-service-review.

negative_cases.prompt: Merge the branches for PROJ-1234. Review is approved.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Branch merging is multi-branch-merge, which comes after cross-service-review.

negative_cases.prompt: Which services are in scope for PROJ-1234?
